creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port was updated to 1.5.0 by danfe (cc'd) in ports r506808

^Triage: Closing OBE accordingly.

If the same issue is still reproducible after updating ports/packages to their latest revisions, please re-open the issue, with additional details, including:

- Crash backtrace (use gdb) included as an attachment
- pkg version -v output (as an attachment)
- System information (uname -a)
- /etc/make.conf contents (as an attachment)
